text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 180 

NDC_UOM_CD 

LABEL: NDC Unit of Measure Code 

DESCRIPTION: This field is a code to indicate the basis by which the quantity of the National Drug Code (NDC) is 
expressed. 

SHORT NAME: NDC_UOM_CD 

LONG NAME: NDC_UOM_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): All line files 

VALUES: EA = Each 
F2 = International Unit 
GM or GR = Gram 
ML =
